theme_archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) - Modified for Creative Agency
design_philosophy: Objective, rigid structure but visually refined. High clarity for heavy daily use (8+ hours/day). Scannability beats decoration. Monochrome base with strategic functional color.

layout_spacing.sidebar: Fixed left sidebar, width 64 (16rem). Clean typography, subtle hover states.
layout_spacing.header: Top header with breadcrumbs and user profile. Sticky, backdrop-blur-md bg-white/80.
layout_spacing.dashboard_grid: Four-Core-Surface Layout. Top row for 4 KPI cards (col-span-1). Middle row for Gantt/Timeline (col-span-3) and workload/list (col-span-1).
layout_spacing.spacing_scale: Use generous internal padding. Cards: p-6. Tables: dense padding py-2 px-4. Dashboard gap: gap-6.

cards.style: Flat surface, no soft shadows. 1px solid border (border-default), rounded-md. Strict, structured look.

buttons.primary: bg-brand_primary text-white hover:bg-brand_primary_hover rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-default text-primary hover:bg-surface_hover rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.ghost: text-secondary hover:text-primary hover:bg-surface_hover rounded-md px-4 py-2 transition-colors

data_tables.style: Dense and scannable. Faint borders on rows, no vertical borders. Sticky header.
data_tables.alignment: Left-align text, right-align numbers/metrics. Avatar clusters for assignees.

gantt_chart.style: Minimal density. Faint or removed vertical grid lines. Bars are flat, monochromatic tiles (use brand_accent or brand_primary) with rounded-sm. No 3D bevels.
gantt_chart.behavior: Progressive disclosure: hide dependency arrows until hovered. Keep timescale headers clean.

kanban_board.style: Subtle column backgrounds (surface_hover). Cards are white, border-default, draggable. Use functional_status pills for priority/tags.

status_pills.style: Rounded-full, text-xs font-medium px-2.5 py-0.5. Use functional_status colors.

interactions_motion.hover: Instant or fast transitions (0.15s ease). No bouncy springs. Professional and snappy.
interactions_motion.focus: High contrast focus ring: focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-brand_primary focus:ring-offset-2

icons.style: Weight: 'regular' for standard UI, 'fill' for active states. Size 20px (w-5 h-5).

accessibility.testing_ids: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='sidebar-projects-link').
accessibility.contrast: Text contrast must meet APCA/WCAG AA standards. Brand primary on white exceeds 10:1.

logo.description: Minimalist geometric black and white pattern for agency logo placeholder.
logo.usage: Use as a square logo mark in the top left of the sidebar.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for structural layout (sidebar + header), avoid overusing Shadcn layout components that constrain flexibility.
Implement the 'Four-Core-Surface' pattern for the dashboard: KPI summary at top, split view below with a prominent Timeline/Gantt chart.
Ensure the Gantt chart is extremely clean: minimal grid lines, flat bar colors, and text inside or next to bars.
Always use data-testid on buttons, inputs, links.
Do NOT use placeholder text or dummy image generation services like via.placeholder.com. Use the provided avatar and logo URLs.
Do NOT apply gradient backgrounds or heavy shadows. Keep the UI flat, crisp, and high-contrast.
